name: JellyUX Homepage
overview: Replaces and enhances the Jellyfin home screen with configurable widgets.
description: A modular home screen engine for Jellyfin. Configure widgets for native content, personalized recommendations, and external sources (TMDb).

versions.changelog:
### Bug Fixes

* add search-as-you-type autocomplete and restore collection label on reload ([57a9a74](https://github.com/Samuellct/JellyUX-Homepage/commit/57a9a740cdd08a8b752587e6c3b7c0791364c96c))
